Name: SQL - Fix Orphaned User
Description: Will fix an orphaned user in the database by re-associating the SID.
Author: twerthi

Parameters.Name: autoFixSqlServer
Parameters.Label: SQL Server
Parameters.HelpText: The SQL Server to perform the work on

Parameters.Name: autoFixSqlLoginUserWhoHasRights
Parameters.Label: SQL Login
Parameters.HelpText:
The login of the user who has permissions to create a database.

Leave blank for integrated security

Parameters.Name: autoFixSqlLoginPasswordWhoHasRights
Parameters.Label: SQL Password
Parameters.HelpText:
The password of the user who has permissions to create SQL Logins

Leave blank for integrated security

Parameters.Name: autoFixDatabaseName
Parameters.Label: Database Name
Parameters.HelpText: The name of the database to create the user on

Parameters.Name: autoFixSqlLogin
Parameters.Label: SQL Login
Parameters.HelpText: The username to attach to the database if it does not exist
